evals.prompt: 帮我按我的设计风格做一个 H5 任务管理首页，要适合手机打开。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, classify the surface as H5/mobile web, apply the user's restrained interface style, account for safe areas and touch targets, avoid hover-only interactions, and include responsive/mobile verification checks.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Classified the platform as H5 or mobile web before proposing UI decisions
Planned to apply personal style tokens or principles such as neutral surfaces, emerald primary emphasis, bordered structure, or Chinese-first compact copy
Planned mobile-specific checks such as safe areas, tap-first interactions, touch targets, or responsive behavior
Did not propose generic decorative gradients, glassmorphism, emoji icons, or stock-like atmosphere

evals.prompt: 审一下这个仪表盘界面，看有没有偏离我的风格。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design in review mode, lead with concrete findings, prioritize accessibility, interaction states, token drift, layout, visual taste, and component architecture, and cite file/line references when files are available.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Planned to use a UI review posture rather than implement the dashboard immediately
Planned to check accessibility, interaction states, token drift, layout, visual taste, or component architecture
Planned to look for style drift such as nested cards, raw colors, arbitrary radii or shadows, generic gradients, or oversized hero treatment in tool UIs

evals.prompt: 生成一个 Sleek prompt，用我的风格设计一个记账 App。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, produce a compact design-generation prompt with user style brief plus the app-specific requirements, and avoid vague instructions such as merely making it beautiful.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Planned to generate a compact Sleek or AI design prompt rather than generic design advice
Identified the product context as an accounting or bookkeeping app
Did not use a vague prompt such as only 'make it beautiful'

evals.prompt: 做一个 HarmonyOS 小组件页面，入口是查看今天的健康数据。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, classify the task as HarmonyOS native UI work, translate design tokens into ArkTS/ArkUI or host Harmony components, and avoid forcing web component assumptions.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Classified the platform as HarmonyOS before proposing implementation details
Planned native HarmonyOS UI work rather than generic web or H5 work
Did not force @design-system/react or web-only component assumptions onto HarmonyOS

evals.prompt: 帮我修一下登录接口 500 的问题。
evals.expected_output: The agent should not trigger ui-design because the request is backend debugging without UI design, implementation, refinement, review, or prompt generation.
expectations: Did NOT trigger the ui-design skill
Treated the request as backend debugging or normal code repair
Did not introduce DESIGN.md visual style guidance into an unrelated server-side fix

evals.prompt: 这个按钮点击后没反应，帮我查一下。
evals.expected_output: The agent should not trigger ui-design by default when the request is an interaction bug investigation rather than a visual design or UI review request, unless local context shows the fix changes interface behavior or states.
expectations: Did NOT trigger ui-design solely because a UI element was mentioned
Planned to debug the interaction failure first

evals.prompt: 给 @design-system/react 加一个 SegmentedControl，保持组件库现在的风格。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, classify the work as web React component-library implementation, prefer existing component-library conventions, keep variant/color/size/shape dimensions orthogonal, use behavior primitives where needed, and plan tests, stories, docs, and browser verification if implementing.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Classified the surface as a web React component-library task
Planned to keep the new SegmentedControl in the current component-library style
Did not route this as a generic UI design or external design-system task

evals.prompt: 按我的风格设计一个微信小程序首页，包含登录态、空状态和网络错误状态。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, classify the task as a mini program, respect WeChat mini program platform constraints, use tap-first lightweight interactions, account for capsule/menu safe area and page stack navigation, and explicitly design login, empty, and network-error states.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Classified the platform as a WeChat mini program or mini program
Planned to account for mini-program constraints such as capsule/menu safe area, page stack navigation, startup performance, or native component availability
Planned to cover login-required, empty, and network-error states

evals.prompt: 这个仓库有自己的 UI rules，但我也想要 个人界面风格的味道，帮我重做设置页。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, inspect or defer to the host repository's newer local rules, then adapt the bundled style through the host design system rather than overriding local conventions blindly.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Planned to read or follow host repository UI rules before applying personal style guidance
Treated local repository rules as higher priority when they are newer or more specific
Planned to reconcile repository UI rules with personal interface style rather than blindly replacing one with the other

evals.prompt: 帮我做一个产品官网首页，要求年轻、有冲击力、彩色渐变多一点。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design for the landing-page design request, treat this as a generic landing-page or visual design task, and avoid imposing a restrained emerald-neutral personal style because the user requested a different visual direction.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Treated the task as a generic landing-page or visual design request
Did not impose the user's personal style when the user requested a different visual direction
Did not reject colorful gradients solely because they conflict with ui-design constraints

evals.prompt: 这个交互别人怎么做？我想调研一下几个写作工具的首次创建文档流程，再决定我的版本。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design in UX Pattern Research mode, inspect or plan to inspect relevant writing-tool UX references, summarize patterns, separate observations from recommendations, and propose a buildable UX direction without jumping straight to visual styling.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Chose UX Pattern Research mode before designing
Planned to inspect 3-6 relevant UX references or products
Separated observed patterns from design recommendations
Recommended a buildable flow or UX direction
Did not make visual style or DESIGN.md the main focus

evals.prompt: 审一下这个 onboarding 流程顺不顺，先不要做视觉风格。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design in UX review mode, focus on flow clarity rather than visual style, lead with the most important UX issues, cover state/recovery gaps when relevant, and avoid applying DESIGN.md visual style as the main answer.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Treated the request as UX review rather than visual UI styling
Prioritized flow clarity, uncertainty, state, or recovery issues
Kept findings concise and concrete
Did not make visual style or DESIGN.md the main focus

evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个设置页，适合个人产品第一版，不要做太复杂。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design in UX Flow / Interaction Design mode, produce a buildable settings-page structure, cover key states or interaction notes, avoid heavy SaaS complexity, and identify what can wait.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Chose UX Flow / Interaction Design mode
Included structure, interaction notes, or states to cover
Identified complexity that can wait
Did not produce an enterprise-level settings system

evals.prompt: 生成一个 Sleek prompt，用我的风格做一个移动端 AI 阅读 App，并告诉我生成后应该怎么验收。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design, use the relevant DESIGN.md and AI design tool playbook, produce a prompt grounded in product workflow and required states, and include generated-screen review expectations such as screenshots, safe areas, touch targets, states, typography, color, and implementation handoff.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Used DESIGN.md guidance because the user asked for '我的风格'
Used AI design tool workflow guidance for Sleek-style generation
Included workflow and state requirements rather than only visual adjectives
Planned to inspect screenshots or rendered output after generation
Mentioned implementation handoff details such as generated source, icons, fonts, navigation, or safe areas

evals.prompt: review my UI against web design guidelines: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design in review mode, treat this as a web UI guidelines review, fetch or plan to fetch the latest Web Interface Guidelines source, read the specified file, and report concrete file/line findings focused on accessibility, interaction states, layout, performance, and implementation risks.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Chose review mode for a specified web UI file
Planned to use the latest Web Interface Guidelines source for formal compliance review
Planned to read the specified file before reporting findings
Prioritized accessibility, interaction states, layout, performance, or implementation risks
Planned file/line grounded findings rather than generic design advice

evals.prompt: 帮我看一下这个设置页的 UX 和视觉层级，顺便给一点移动端适配建议。
evals.expected_output: The agent should trigger ui-design from the compact description, classify this as UX/UI review or refinement, inspect flow and visual hierarchy, and include mobile adaptation checks without requiring a long phrase list in the frontmatter.
expectations: Triggered the ui-design skill
Classified the request as UX/UI review or refinement
Planned to assess flow, hierarchy, states, or interaction quality
Included mobile adaptation concerns such as safe areas, touch targets, responsive layout, or viewport behavior
